stories.title: No GPS tracker for Arnold, can work out for teams
stories.summary: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold does not need to wear a GPS tracker as a condition of his release, a Florida judge ruled on Friday, allowing him to continue to work out with NFL teams in an effort to get re-signed after being cut.

stories.title: Scheffler headed for first missed cut in 4 years
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler was making plans for an early arrival to Royal Birkdale after he stumbled through a round of 2-over 72 on Friday at the Scottish Open and seemed certain to miss the cut for the first time in nearly four years.

stories.title: Zverev ends Fery's run, to play for 2nd straight G...
stories.summary: Alexander Zverev will play for another major trophy, this time in the Wimbledon final, a month after winning his first Grand Slam title at the French Open.

stories.title: Dybantsa outduels Peterson in Las Vegas debut
stories.summary: AJ Dybantsa, this year's No. 1 pick, led all players with 27 points to power the Wizards to a win over the Jazz and No. 2 pick Darryn Peterson.

stories.title: Clips-Raptors trade for Kawhi on hold amid probe
stories.summary: The Clippers-Raptors trade involving Kawhi Leonard will not be completed until the NBA probe into whether the Clippers circumvented the salary cap is completed.
